html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Polio.IPV-only schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: First IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Third IPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
Booster IPV dose was administered. Polio immunization schedule has been completed

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Polio.IPV-only schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: First IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Third IPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
Booster IPV dose was administered. Polio immunization schedule has been completed
